title: centaurea solstitialis subsp. solstitialis
intro: Centaurea solstitialis subsp. solstitialis, also known as yellow star thistle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea solstitialis subsp. solstitialis include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
